activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception if explicit Letter of Credit number present
Consignor may deviate if name found anywhere in invoice
General goods description with invoice reference
Link goods description to origin when multiple origins
EU/European Union origin normalization and extra EU members

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Car Corporation' with address in Sweden is explicitly found as invoice issuer and repeated in invoice header and VAT registration number block. No mismatch in name or country found. Avvikelser allowed for address details. Rule 4.1.0 applies with confirmed match.

consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address 'WINNER IMPORTS UKRAINE LTD' with matching street and city found directly in invoice recipient details ('Financial Customer'). Country 'UKRAINE' matches exactly. Minor address formatting differences acceptable. Result MATCH per 4.2.1.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Autoparts,See attached inv: 2602763
dated 20260223 Grossweight refers to CMR and cargospec
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detail part descriptions with article numbers, e.g. 'BUMPER COVER', 'WIPER ARM', 'FLANGE SCREW', 'TRANSMISSION OIL', etc.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description 'Autoparts' with explicit invoice reference and date, fulfilling rule 4.3.5 allowing varubeskrivning with fakturareferens. Invoice contains detailed itemized descriptions matching referenced invoice number. However, certificate contains multiple origin countries (CN MX SE DE FR CA HU CZ US SK PL GB JP MA IT MK ES NO NL KR) without per-item origin link. This triggers mixed origins rule 4.3.7 requiring explicit origin per article or invoice reference confirmation. Since origin linkage per article is missing, and detailed description match is general, final verification for goods description requires manual review.

quantity.invoice_value:
Total 13 PACKAGE
Gross weight 399.2 KG
Invoice total weight 162047.27 SEK total value
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity of 399.2 Gross KG and 13 cases is explicitly stated. Invoice confirms total weight 399.2 KG and exactly 13 packages total. Quantity value matches exactly after normalization of decimal (comma to dot). No discrepancy found in weight or package count. Verification per 4.4.3 and 4.4.3.2 results in MATCH.

origin.certificate_value: CN MX SE DE FR CA HU CZ US SK PL GB JP MA IT MK ES NO NL KR
origin.invoice_value: Origins per item with ISO and country codes matching certificate origins, including codes like CN *, MX *, SE, DE, FR *, CA *, HU, CZ, US *, SK, PL, GB, JP, MA *, IT *, MK, ES, NO, NL *, KR *
origin.motivation: Certificate specifies multiple countries of origin including 'CN', 'MX', 'SE', 'DE', 'FR', etc. Invoice origin codes per article correspond exactly to these countries, marked including allowed variations and suffixes (e.g. '*'). EU normalization rules apply for European countries, accepted as matching. Hong Kong/China equivalency applied. No origin listed on invoice contradicts certificate. Result MATCH per 4.5.4.1 and 4.6.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points except goods description clearly match between certificate and invoice. Goods description uses a general description with invoice reference but lacks explicit per-article origin linkage amid multiple origins, requiring manual review.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet är generell och hänvisar till fakturan, men det finns ingen tydlig koppling mellan varje uppgift och ursprungsland vilket gör verifieringen oklar. Övriga kontrollpunkter såsom avsändare, mottagare, mängd och ursprungsland stämmer. Manuell granskning krävs för varubeskrivningen.
